name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_gameplay_fit_candidate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisGameplayFitCandidate maps accepted live A4MC multi-axis coefficient sweeps into body-drag sideforce lift moment and pressure-center gameplay-fit candidates without changing runtime physics.
note: Reference surface for multi-axis coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.

name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_coefficient_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisCoefficientAcceptanceGate blocks unavailable test-runtime incomplete unbounded or forward/reverse sign-inconsistent coefficient sets before candidate adoption.
note: Reference surface for multi-axis coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.

name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_coefficient_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisCoefficientSeed supplies directional projected-area signed axial body-axis moment and pressure-center coefficients for all sweep targets.
note: Reference surface for multi-axis coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.

name: drone_config_airframe_terms
value: DroneConfig supplies current bodyDragCoefficients angularDragCoefficient and centerOfPressureOffsetBodyMeters values used for target-to-current comparisons.
note: Reference surface for multi-axis coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live multi-axis L2 wind-tunnel coefficient fitting.
note: Reference surface for multi-axis coefficient-to-gameplay-fit candidate mapping.
